questions.correct_answer: End products of catabolism of protein & purines

questions.question: Functional proteinuria is due to :
questions.correct_answer: Exercise, fever, exposure to cold & postural Proteinuria
wrong_answers: Exercise, fever, exposure to cold  and heart failure
Exercise, fever, exposure to cold  and tubular ischemia
Exercise, fever, exposure to cold and multiple myeloma

questions.question: How renal tubular function is evaluated ?

Which type of urine sample is most suitable for creatinine clearance calculation?
Which of the following is an advantage of cystatin C over creatinine?
questions.correct_answer: Cystatin C rises to a detectable level earlier than creatinine
wrong_answers: Cystatin C in serum is proportionally correlated with the GFR
Cystatin C is reabsorbed by the kidney tubules.
Cystatin C shows different results based on diet.

questions.question: Which of the following markers is useful for prediction of organ rejection?

questions.correct_answer: A specific gravity of 1.025 in an early morning sample
wrong_answers: A specific gravity of 1.010 in a 24-h urine sample
Urine osmolality in a random urine sample is 600 mosmol/kg

questions.question: Which of the following is true regarding a response to fluid deprivation test?
questions.correct_answer: Psycogenic cause of failure to concentrate urine.
wrong_answers: DDAVP is required to conclude the test

questions.question: In a case of nephogenic failure to concentrate urine, which of the following are the most probable results to fluid deprivation and DDAVP tests respectively?

questions.correct_answer: 3 mg/dl creatinine in a pediatric patient
